question:
Will 1. FSV Mainz 05 vs. ACF Fiorentina end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 6, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.uefa.com/

evidences.content: Tariq Lamptey is a long-term absentee for Fiorentina with a knee injury, while Robin Gosens (hamstring) is also on the treatment table. evidences.content: This will be the first-ever meeting between the two clubs, but Fiorentina’s overall record against German opposition doesn’t inspire confidence - just four wins from sixteen encounters, with nine defeats. Still, their pedigree in this competition is undeniable. Having reached back-to-back finals in 2022/23 and 2023/24 before a semi-final run last season, Fiorentina will be desperate to finally go one step further and lift the trophy this time around. evidences.title: New format for Champions League post-2024 - UEFA.com
evidences.content: Under the new format, teams will play eight matches in the new league phase (former group stage). They will no longer play three opponents twice – home and away – but will instead face fixtures against eight different teams, playing half of those matches at home and half of them away. To determine the eight different opponents, the teams will initially be ranked in four seeding pots. Each team will then be drawn to play two opponents from each of these pots, playing one match against a team from each pot at home, and one away. [...] In standard weeks, Champions League matches will be played on Tuesdays and Wednesdays, while Europa League and Europa Conference League matches will be contested on Thursdays. In the Champions League exclusive week, Champions League matches will be played on Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday. In the Europa League exclusive week, Europa League matches will be held on Wednesday and Thursday. In the Europa Conference League exclusive week, Europa Conference League matches will take place on Thursday. For the last matchday of each of the competitions' league phases, all games will be played simultaneously. ## How will the new Champions League format benefi...

evidences.title: Late Fall shows a dynamic Weather pattern, but the start of Winter ...
evidences.content: In this article, we will first look at the last days of this month, before doing a weather forecast breakdown for November. But the main interest is now on the start of the meteorological Winter 2025/2026, which has now arrived within the range of extended range model forecasts, and shows interesting development. weather-fall-november-forecast-temperature-pressure-anomaly-united-states-canada-jet-stream-polar-vortex-movement-winter-startweather-fall-november-forecast-temperature-pressure-anomaly-united-states-canada-jet-stream-polar-vortex-movement-winter-start [...] The daily (and seasonal) movement of the pressure systems is what causes these temperature patterns and weather changes. Pairs of pressure systems are known as Rossby Waves, which shape our daily weather. You can see an example of Rossby waves in the image below from NOAA, and how they are all connected and function with the jet stream. winter-weather-november-2025-forecast-united-states-canada-low-pressure-pattern-what-are-rossby-waves-jet-streamwinter-weather-november-2025-forecast-united-states-canada-low-pressure-pattern-what-are-rossby-waves-jet-stream winter-weather-november-2025-forecast-united-states-canada-...

evidences.title: Historic vs. Historical: How to Choose the Right Word
evidences.content: Fourth: How to Choose the Right WordImage 27: Personal and personnel:max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(948x0:950x2):format(webp)/Getty_personal_and_personnel-171149937-5804e11a5f9b5805c2a013ac.jpg) Personal vs. Personnel: How to Choose the Right WordImage 29: Menopausal woman having a hot flash at the office:max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(2807x0:2809x2):format(webp)/menopausal-woman-having-a-hot-flash-at-the-office-183801605-577172be5f9b585875bb1a03.jpg) Affect vs. Effect: How to Choose the Right WordImage 31:max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(639x0:641x2):format(webp)/animal-baby-bear-1083502-da1aec4680c94da6bab78196b52949ff.jpg) Bare vs. Bear: How to Choose the Right WordImage 33: advice and [...] “Historical" has more letters than "historic," just as the definition of "historical" encompasses more events, objects, and people than the definition of "historic." “Historic” ends with the letter C. "C" stands for "critical." Historic objects or events are critical components of history. “Historical” ends with the letter L. "L" stands for "long ago." Historical objects or events relate to anything that happened in the past, but may or may not be historically significant. ##...
